comment_text:
Did this show get any better is it still;

1. Side characters hyping up the fight 
2. Gods & Angels plotting and playing the pronoun game
3. Fight starts
4. Fighter 1 lands a blow
5. Reaction shots from everyone
6. Flashback telling us why charater 1 is badass
7. Audience member/side character hypes up one fighter
8. Fighter 2 lands a blow
9. Flashback telling us why Fighter 2 is badass
10. Repeat steps 2-9 but increase reaction shots exponetionally with each loop
11.  Hype for both characters finishing move
12. Flashback for both characters
13. Final Ultimate Attack for both

TLDR; Hype + Puch(Reaction Shots + Flashback)  = ROR
